mapper.select: SELECT l.LOCATION_ID, l.ZONE_ID, l.LOCATION_CD, l.LOCATION_NM, l.MAX_CAPACITY, l.CURRENT_USAGE, l.LOCATION_STATUS, l.USE_YN, l.REG_USER_ID, l.REG_DTM, l.UPD_USER_ID, l.UPD_DTM, z.PLANT_CD, p.PLANT_NM, z.WAREHOUSE_CD, w.WAREHOUSE_NM, z.ZONE_CD, z.ZONE_NM, c.COM_NM AS LOCATION_STATUS_NM FROM MCS_LOCATION l INNER JOIN MCS_ZONE z ON l.ZONE_ID = z.ZONE_ID INNER JOIN MST_PLANT p ON z.PLANT_CD = p.PLANT_CD INNER JOIN MST_WAREHOUSE w ON z.WAREHOUSE_CD = w.WAREHOUSE_CD LEFT JOIN COM_CODE c ON c.GRP_CD = 'MCS_LOC_STATUS' AND l.LOCATION_STATUS = c.COM_CD WHERE l.LOCATION_ID = #{locationId}
SELECT * FROM MCS_LOCATION WHERE ZONE_ID = #{zoneId} AND LOCATION_CD = #{locationCd}
mapper.update: UPDATE MCS_LOCATION SET LOCATION_NM = #{locationNm}, MAX_CAPACITY = #{maxCapacity}, LOCATION_STATUS = #{locationStatus}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE LOCATION_ID = #{locationId}
